resolution_steps: 1. Click on 'Teams' in the sidebar menu. 2. Click on the dropdown to select the admin. 3. Select the admin based on the timing. 4. Click the 'Send & Assign' button. 5. Click on 'Dashboard'from the sidebar menu. 6. Click the 'Resolve' button for the same error.

1. Click on 'Cart' from the sidebar menu. 2. Select any three random item options. 3. Click the 'Download' button. 4. Click the 'Send Email' button. 5. Click the 'Send Now' button. 6. Click on 'Dashboard' from the sidebar menu. 7. Click the 'Resolve' button for the same error.

1. Click on 'Customer Detail' from the sidebar menu. 2. Locate the 'Missing/Incorrect Credentials Detected' card and identify the reported email ID and password shown there. 3. Enter the same reported email ID and password into the reported email and reported password input field. 4. Click the 'Verify & Send Correction' button. 5. Click 'Send Now' button and wait untill the email is sent. 6. Click on 'Dashboard' from the sidebar menu. 7. Click the 'Resolve' button for the same error.
